zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Strong於1613年6月29日之前出生在英國多瑟特哈德斯托可時，她的父親Thomas Strong34歲，母親Joanna Bagge33歲。她於大約1636年與Lieutenant William Clarke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1675年9月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Strong于1613年6月29日之前出生在英国多瑟特哈德斯托可时，她的父亲Thomas Strong34岁，母亲Joanna Bagge33岁。她于大约1636年与Lieutenant William Clarke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1675年9月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Strong was born before 29 June 1613, in Chardstock, Dorset, England, her father, Thomas Strong, was 34 and her mother, Joanna Bagge, was 33. She married Lieutenant William Clarke about 1636, in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 September 1675, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Strong est née avant 29 juin 1613, à Chardstock, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Strong, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joanna Bagge, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Lieutenant William Clarke environ 1636, à Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 septembre 1675, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Strong vor 29. Juni 1613 in Chardstock, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Strong 34 und ihre Mutter Joanna Bagge 33. Sie hat um 1636 in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Lieutenant William Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. September 1675 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Strong è nata il prima del 29 giugno 1613 nel Chardstock, Dorset, England, sua padre, Thomas Strong, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joanna Bagge, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Lieutenant William Clarke circa 1636, nel Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1675, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Strongが1613年6月29日以前にイギリスドールセトチャードストックで生まれた時，父Thomas Strongは34歳，母Joanna Baggeは33歳であった。約1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニードールチェスターでLieutenant William Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1675年9月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴
ko.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 도르체스터
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Strong(이)가 1613년 6월 29일 이전 영국 도르세트 처스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Strong(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Bagge(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터에서 Lieutenant William Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 9월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Strong nasceu antes 29 de junho de 1613, em Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Strong, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Bagge, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Lieutenant William Clarke aproximadamente 1636, em Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1675, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Strong родилась перед 29 июнь 1613 г. в местности чардстокк, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Strong было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Bagge, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lieutenant William Clarke около 1636 г. в местности дорчестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 сентября 1675 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Strong nació antes de 29 de junio de 1613, en Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Strong, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joanna Bagge, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lieutenant William Clarke aproximadamente 1636, en Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1675, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
